channel.title: SecureLint Blog
channel.description: Latest articles about browser security, Browser DLP, phishing protection, API key masking, sensitive data protection, and cybersecurity.

item.title: Meeting Mode: Blur Secrets During Video Calls
item.description: Learn how SecureLint automatically protects API keys, passwords, and sensitive information during screen sharing.

item.title: How SecureLint Automatically Masks API Keys in Every Text Editor, Textarea & Input
item.description: SecureLint detects AWS keys, GitHub tokens, Stripe secrets, OpenAI keys, and 100+ credential patterns in real time across VS Code Web, CodeSandbox, Notion, Jira, and every input on the web.

item.title: Real-Time Phishing Email Detection: How SecureLint Scans Every Message Before You Click
item.description: SecureLint checks SPF, DKIM, and DMARC headers, scores every link against 14 threat signals, and surfaces a clear 0–100 trust score before you open a suspicious email.

item.title: Malicious Browser Extension Detection: What SecureLint Checks and Why It Matters
item.description: Rogue Chrome extensions silently read passwords, inject ads, and exfiltrate session cookies. SecureLint audits installed extensions against known malicious signatures.

item.title: How SecureLint Automatically Blocks Phishing Websites Before You Land on Them
item.description: SecureLint evaluates domain age, SSL status, brand impersonation score, and URL patterns in real time. When you click a suspicious link, a popup warning appears before the page loads.

item.title: IT Security Policies for Browser Threats: Blocking Malicious Sites & Extensions Across Your Team
item.description: Enterprise SecureLint lets IT admins push policies that block known-malicious domains, restrict extension installs, and trigger real-time incident alerts — without endpoint agents.

item.title: Automatic Malicious Download Scanning: How SecureLint Checks Files Before You Open Them
item.description: Before a downloaded file lands in your folder, SecureLint checks its hash against known malware signatures and inspects the source domain reputation.

item.title: Webcam & Screen Recording Detection: How SecureLint Alerts You When a Site Activates Your Camera
item.description: Websites can silently request webcam and microphone access. SecureLint surfaces a real-time alert the moment any page activates these permissions.

item.title: How SecureLint Stops Phishing Links in Emails with Real-Time Popup Warnings
item.description: When you click a link inside Gmail or Outlook, SecureLint silently scores it and intercepts your click with an Unsafe Link Detected popup if it's suspicious.

item.title: Password Breach Monitoring: How SecureLint Detects and Notifies You When Your Credentials Leak
item.description: SecureLint cross-references your saved passwords against live breach databases including HaveIBeenPwned and notifies you the moment a credential leak is detected.

item.title: The Developer's Complete Guide to Preventing API Key Leaks in the Browser (2026)
item.description: API keys accidentally pasted into Slack, live demos, or public repos cause massive breaches. This guide covers every vector and how SecureLint closes them all automatically.

item.title: SecureLint Enterprise Browser DLP: Secret Masking, Email DLP & Threat Intelligence (2026)
item.description: A deep-dive into SecureLint's enterprise layer — team-wide DLP rules, email send blocking, admin dashboards, extension allowlists, and SIEM integrations.
